message.content: Adversaries may gather employee names to aid in targeting efforts, leveraging this information to derive email addresses, guide reconnaissance, and craft convincing lures. Employee names are often easily accessible through online data sets, social media, or company websites. This information can facilitate further reconnaissance, establish operational resources, and enable initial access through methods such as phishing or compromising valid accounts. Notable groups like Kimsuky, Sandworm Team, and Silent Librarian have been known to collect employee names for these purposes. Mitigation strategies include limiting the exposure of employee information online, implementing robust email filtering, and conducting regular security awareness training to recognize and respond to phishing attempts.
